title: senecio hochstetteri
intro: Senecio hochstetteri, also known as the "African wormwood," is a plant species that belongs to the daisy family, Asteraceae. Traditionally, the leaves of Senecio hochstetteri have been used for their medicinal properties, particularly for their ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The plant's leaves contain sesquiterpene lactones, which have been shown to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it a valuable remedy for various health conditions. Senecio hochstetteri is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, to take advantage of its medicinal properties and health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system.
